extName.message: ImageVault: encrypt & back up secrets as QR / paper images

extDesc.message: Encrypt a file into robust, error-corrected images you can store on disk, print on paper, or upload to the cloud.

popupTagline.message: Encrypt a file into resilient images — disk, paper, or cloud.
popupTagline.description: Short tagline shown in the popup.

extShortName.description: Product name shown in the app header.

pillLocked.description: Header status pill when the vault is locked.

pillUnlocked.description: Header status pill when the vault is unlocked.

webIntro.message: A free, open-source web version — no install, no account, and nothing leaves your device. Save a file as images or restore one. (Google Photos needs the browser extension.)
webIntro.description: Intro banner on the web app.

unlockPrompt.message: Enter your password to unlock saving.
unlockPrompt.description: Popup: prompt when the vault is locked.

noKeyTitle.description: Popup: shown when no key is set.

noKeyBody.message: Set up your vault key in the options page before saving files.
noKeyBody.description: Popup: guidance when no key is set.

cloudNote.message: A convenience — never your only copy.
cloudNote.description: Popup: note under the Google Photos option.

statusSavedCloud.message: Uploaded $COUNT$ image(s) to the album “$ALBUM$”. Keep your password safe.
statusSavedCloud.description: Popup: status after uploading to Google Photos.

btnRestorePhotos.description: Popup: button to restore via the Photos picker.

photosIntro.message: This runs in its own tab so it stays open while you pick your images. Enter your password, start, choose the vault's images in the picker, then return here.

statusPickerOpen.message: Pick your ImageVault images in the window that opened, then come back…
statusPickerOpen.description: Popup: status while the picker is open.

labelInstructions.description: Popup: paper option to add the instruction page.

labelPasswordHint.description: Popup: password hint printed on the instruction sheet.

labelKeyLocation.description: Popup: key location note printed on the instruction sheet.

paperCleartextWarn.message: The instruction sheet is not encrypted — write a hint, never the password.
paperCleartextWarn.description: Popup: cleartext warning for the instruction sheet fields.

statusSavedPdf.message: Done. Downloaded a PDF with $COUNT$ page(s). Keep your password safe.
statusSavedPdf.description: Popup: status after saving to PDF.

keyModeEmbedded.message: Keep it simple — one set of images

keyModeKeyfile.message: Extra safety — a separate key file

keyModeHelp.message: With a separate key file, a leaked image reveals nothing on its own — but you must keep the .key too.
keyModeHelp.description: Key-mode explanation (shown under a Why? disclosure).

labelAddBand.message: Add a readable label on the images
labelAddBand.description: Popup: toggle for the readable band.

titlePlaceholder.message: Name this vault — e.g. “Archive Alpha”. Avoid names like “Bitcoin keys”.
titlePlaceholder.description: Popup: pedagogical placeholder for the label title.

bandWarning.message: The label is not encrypted — never put a secret in it.
bandWarning.description: Popup: cleartext warning for the readable band.

keyFileHint.message: Only needed for sets you saved as a separate .key file (skip if it is inside the .zip).
keyFileHint.description: Popup: hint for the restore key file input.

labelAsZip.description: Popup: toggle to download one zip instead of many files.

labelImagesOrZip.message: Image files, a .zip, or a printed PDF
labelImagesOrZip.description: Popup: restore input label (images or zip).

estimateImages.description: Popup: label before the estimated image count.

statusSaved.message: Done. Downloaded $COUNT$ image(s). Keep your password safe — it cannot be recovered.

statusSavedKeyfile.message: Done. Downloaded $COUNT$ image(s) and a .key file. Keep the .key and your password safe.
statusSavedKeyfile.description: Popup: status after saving in keyfile mode.

errNoImages.message: Choose the image files to restore from.

errWrongPassword.description: Shown when restore or unlock fails.

errLocked.description: Popup: shown when saving while locked.

errMissingKey.message: This image set needs its separate .key file to restore.
errMissingKey.description: Shown when a keyfile-mode set is restored without the .key.

errFileTooLarge.message: File too large ($SIZE$ KB). This vault targets small secrets (max $LIMIT$ KB).
errFileTooLarge.description: Shown when the file exceeds the size limit.

errTooManyImages.message: This file would need $COUNT$ images (max $LIMIT$). Try a smaller file.
errTooManyImages.description: Shown when the vault would exceed the image ceiling.

optKeyBodyNew.message: Create a vault key. Every file you save is encrypted with it.
optKeyBodyNew.description: Options: shown when no key exists.

optKeyBodyExists.message: A vault key is set up on this device.
optKeyBodyExists.description: Options: shown when a key exists.

passwordHint.message: Your password cannot be recovered. If you forget it, your vaults are lost — consider exporting your key.

exportBody.message: Download the wrapped key (.key) to transfer or back it up. It stays password-protected.

importBody.message: Import a .key file from another device. This replaces the current key.

eraseBody.message: Permanently delete the vault key from this device. Files already saved become unrecoverable unless you kept an exported .key. This cannot be undone.

confirmErase.message: Really erase the vault key? Saved files will be unrecoverable without an exported .key.

btnScanCamera.description: Web restore: button that opens the live camera scanner.

cameraTitle.description: Web restore: camera scanner dialog title.

cameraHint.message: Point the camera at each image or printed page. Every new code is added automatically.
cameraHint.description: Web restore: how the live camera scanner works.

cameraDone.description: Web restore: close the camera scanner.

cameraCount.description: Web restore: number of QR payloads captured by the camera.

errCamera.description: Web restore: camera could not be started.
